name: Irish Herb Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil or bake the potatoes until they are tender.
2. Pass the potatoes through a food mill to ensure a smooth consistency.
3. Mix the flour, salt, oil, and herbs with the mashed potatoes.
4. On a floured surface, roll the dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
5. Cut the rolled dough into triangles that are approximately 3-4 inches wide.
6. Fry the triangles in very hot oil on both sides until they are light golden brown.
(Note: Attribution removed as per instructions.)
